name: node-llhttp
title: node-llhttp
summary: HTTP messages parser library - Node.js module
description:
HTTP messages parser library - Node.js module
llhttp generates a C HTTP messages parser from typescript
definitions, making it easier to maintain.
.
This package contains the Node.js module that exposes
constants and exports the WebAssembly blobs.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-llhttp because HTTP messages parser library - Node.js module.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-llhttp as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-llhttp with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-llhttp --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
